title: ux-DatePicker
text: ux-DatePicker This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-DatePicker properties. ux-DatePicker Widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-DatePicker Maps to physical widget: uxTextField of type date Default definition: ux-DatePicker=uxTextField(html:type=date) Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Fields of Uniface data types Date, Time, and DateTime. Related Links uxtextfield The uxtextfield widget is a single-line text input control. It allows entry of various formats of single-line text, including plain text, text according to a certain pattern, date, tel, email, password, and URL. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
